---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Request

### Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. 
Ex. I'm frustrated when [...]

### Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Use Case

**Who will benefit from this feature?**
- [ ] Individual developers
- [ ] Small teams
- [ ] Enterprise users
- [ ] Administrators
- [ ] Other: ___________

**How would you use this feature?**

Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be helpful.

### Implementation Ideas (Optional)

If you have technical ideas on how to implement this feature, please share:

- **Components affected**: 
- **API changes needed**: 
- **Database schema changes**: 
- **Third-party libraries**: 

### Priority

How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Can't use the product without it
- [ ] High - Would make the product significantly better
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

### Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

### Mockups/Examples (Optional)

If you have any visual mockups or examples from other tools, please share them here.

---

**Note**: Please search existing feature requests before creating a new one to avoid duplicates.
